creator: tkato@prontomail.com
text:
> How about the following change to your patch?

Although concept would be better than original, 
actuall procedure
to convert PORTVERSION/DISTNAME can be more easier 
to read.

Could you confirm

DISTNAME=	ttf-xtt_0.${PORTVERSION:R:S/.//g}-
${PORTVERSION:T}

works as expected?
